title: Issues deploying podman build|push images to Google Cloud Run
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**This is not a significant issue for me but it is curiously reproducible and unexpected**

I'm experiencing errors attempting to deploy `podman build` then `podman push` images to [Google Cloud Run](https://cloud.google.com/run).

The issue may (!?) be related to [Google Artifact Registry (GAR)](https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry) since the only difference I can determine is in the manifests.

> **NOTE** I will try using Google Container Registry (GCR) instead but Cloud Run requires images to be sourced from one of these (local) registries

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

> **NOTE** I've created a [repo](https://github.com/DazWilkin/podman-cloudrun) that attempts to summarizes the issue

1. Use docker then podman to build|push the simplest Golang HTTP server to GAR

2. The image builds/pushes successful for both docker and podman and can be run locally.

3. Deploy the image to Google Cloud Run

4. The image built|pushed w/ Docker, succeeds. The image built/pushed with podman fails with an error that the image is not found

**Describe the results you received:**

When attempting to deploy the podman built/pushed image to Google Cloud Run. The command fails:

ERROR: (gcloud.run.deploy) Image '${GXR}/test:${TAG}' not found.

> **NOTE** `${GXR}/test:${TAG}` replaces actual values

But issuing a follow-up command to list the artifacts returns the expected image.

The manifest of the podman image is:

```JSON
{
   "schemaVersion": 2,
   "config": {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.config.v1+json",
      "digest": "sha256:c5b7c280249c63bca3ba83a7852d7390000dc6a8a8c53cd3e062f6de666c2c00",
      "size": 1252
   },
   "layers": [
      {
         "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip",
         "digest": "sha256:fbbe5ec849096cd0a717b9dffac72feff3c726904f5c97d915033c1f3d0aa080",
         "size": 3416701
      },
      {
         "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.layer.v1.tar+gzip",
         "digest": "sha256:ff1530fdc3b761a80710ba1fa297d8e49a08d8ba741233b961ec7203e398aed9",
         "size": 528
      }
   ],
   "annotations": {
      "org.opencontainers.image.base.digest": "sha256:4c2bc00a54eca50b19c362ad7ad661533a9a7faddb56f05e786389978ab48ed5",
      "org.opencontainers.image.base.name": ""
   }
}
```

The manifest of the docker image is:

```JSON
{
   "schemaVersion": 2,
   "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json",
   "config": {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.container.image.v1+json",
      "size": 2170,
      "digest": "sha256:f783d5105f86039f7b1e4be4b6098ec825c6b5bd691c9895a96ada45b8bc7948"
   },
   "layers": [
      {
         "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip",
         "size": 3353027,
         "digest": "sha256:2ee6e5a95ffd776c838173760a9e26b8928af254de26ffa46239a8784d230cb6"
      },
      {
         "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip",
         "size": 506,
         "digest": "sha256:8c8d35748333119603266ea2ce97e88340292e457b0f55d01ed6ddc05b9388d3"
      }
   ]
}
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

I expected the podman built/pushed image to deploy to Cloud Run without issue.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

The issue repros. The example in the repo is the simplest example I could think to create.

The issue arose for a more complex solution.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.0
API Version:  3.4.0
Go Version:   go1.16.6
Built:        Wed Dec 31 16:00:00 1969
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes/No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: If you build the image with `--format docker`, does it work?  If yes this means that Google does not support the newer format yet.  You should open an issue with their registry.  OCI Format has been available for years.

Thanks for the prompt response.

Adding `--format=docker` to the build solved the issue for both Google Artifact Registry and Container Registry.
Could you open an issue with them to support OCI images.  Everyone else does.
